Author: Bancho
Name: Hrothgar Make Coin
Description: Automatically undercuts your retainer market board listings, with optional AutoRetainer post-venture integration. A rebrand/fork of Dagobert by SHOEGAZEssb.
Changelog: Auto-list now handles an item's NQ and HQ as separate entries, so you can whitelist both and each is priced against its own quality's market. Fixes a bug where typing a Max price could silently wipe an item's Min price floor. The market board price is now matched to the item it was requested for, so a slow reply can't be posted as the next item's price. Sliders take a double-click to type an exact value, and the price check wait now defaults to 2000ms (HQ needs the extra time to look past the NQ listings).

Author: Bancho
Name: Hrothgar Scent
Punchline: Hrothgar smell you. Hrothgar know who watching.
Description: A nearby-player list where every row shows whether that player is targeting you, with a watcher history and alerts.
Changelog: A Journal, in-game portraits, and richer profiles. The new Journal window gathers everyone you have marked and — if you switch it on — everyone recorded near you, on their own filter rows for race, world and tag, searched and sorted. Turn on 'record every nearby player' to keep a durable log of who you meet; it stays separate from your marks and never touches them. Click a profile picture to capture and save that player's in-game Adventurer Plate portrait as your own copy. Profiles now show race and world as tags, how many times they have emoted at you this session, the duties you have cleared together, and the names they used to go by; marks remember when you first saw someone and how many times since. Quality-of-life throughout: double-click any window's title bar to collapse it to just the bar, hop between the Journal, settings and the main window from every window's top bar, and a focused player no longer re-announces their arrival while they stay in sight. Nothing is collected in PvP.
